title: chabertia micrantha
intro: Chabertia micrantha, also known as small-flowered chabertia or small-flowered broomrape, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Chabertia micrantha is reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as being used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, often consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
